sector_tensions.name: Belonging is built before the building
sector_tensions.territory: The gap between real estate as transaction (square metres, features, price) and real estate as belonging (community, identity, roots). For brands that understand they are not selling property — they are selling a place to be from.

sector_tensions.name: The Saudi home has always been a statement
sector_tensions.territory: The deep cultural significance of the Saudi home — as an expression of family, hospitality, and status. For brands that connect their development to the cultural meaning of home in Saudi life.

_source: DNA v3 + real hashtags + occasion_facts + strategy_frameworks + campaign_archive
